title: Coach skill rating scale catalog
description: The two supported rating scales + their value encodings. Both scales encode 1-5; the display + intent differ.

scales.label: Stars (1-5)
scales.note: Freeform star rating. Best for subjective evaluation ('how skilled is this coach at teaching serve technique?').

scales.label: Level (Beginner → Master)
scales.note: Level-based rating. Best for domain-competency evaluation ('what level of goalkeeper training is this coach qualified to lead?'). Encodes to 1-5 for storage but SDUI renders as the level label.

notes: Both scales encode integer 1..5 in the rating_value column. The rating_scale column tells SDUI which label set to render.
The `display_widget` column tells SDUI which widget to reuse — the skill-rating-stars widget renders differently based on rating_scale ('★★★★☆' vs 'Advanced'/4).
Adding a third scale requires: update this file + add to the CoachRatingScale enum + update the observer's valid_rating_value_for_scale rule.
